lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣਹਾਰੁ ਜੋ ਕਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਾਈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: karanahaar jo kar rahiaa saaee vaddiaaee |
lines.english: Whatever the Creator Lord does is glorious and great.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧੇ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਮੑਾਰੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: deen deaal kripaa nidhe saas saas samaarai |2|
lines.english: Merciful to the meek, the treasure of mercy, He remembers and protects us with each and every breath. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿੰਤ ਅੰਦੇਸਾ ਗਣਤ ਤਜਿ ਜਨਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: chint andesaa ganat taj jan hukam pachhaataa |
lines.english: Anxieties, worries and calculations are dismissed; the Lord's humble servant accepts the Hukam of His Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਉਪਦੇਸਿਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਖਸਮ ਰਜਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur poorai upadesiaa sukh khasam rajaaee |3|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has instructed me, that peace comes by the Will of our Lord and Master. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਨਹ ਛੋਡਿ ਜਾਇ ਨਾਨਕ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ॥੪॥੧੮॥੪੮॥
lines.translit: neh binasai neh chhodd jaae naanak rang raataa |4|18|48|
lines.english: He does not die, and He does not leave; Nanak is attuned to His Love. ||4||18||48||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਤਪਤਿ ਤੇ ਭਈ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਪਰਸਤ ਪਾਪ ਨਾਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa tapat te bhee saant parasat paap naatthe |
lines.english: The great fire is put out and cooled; meeting with the Guru, sins run away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਹਮਾਰੇ ਸਾਜਨਾ ਹਮ ਉਨ ਕੀ ਰੇਨ ॥
lines.translit: oe hamaare saajanaa ham un kee ren |
lines.english: He is my friend; I am the dust of His Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧ ਕੂਪ ਮਹਿ ਗਲਤ ਥੇ ਕਾਢੇ ਦੇ ਹਾਥੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: andh koop meh galat the kaadte de haathe |1|
lines.english: I fell into the deep dark pit; giving me His Hand, He pulled me out. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਭੇਟਤ ਹੋਵਤ ਸੁਖੀ ਜੀਅ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin bhettat hovat sukhee jeea daan den |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meeting with Him, I am at peace; He blesses me with the gift of the soul. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਾ ਪੂਰਬਲਾ ਲੀਖਿਆ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਅਬ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: paraa poorabalaa leekhiaa miliaa ab aae |
lines.english: I have now received my pre-ordained destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸਤ ਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਪੂਰਨ ਆਸਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: basat sang har saadh kai pooran aasaae |2|
lines.english: Dwelling with the Lord's Holy Saints, my hopes are fulfilled. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਤਿਹੁ ਲੋਕ ਕੇ ਪਾਏ ਸੁਖ ਥਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: bhai binase tihu lok ke paae sukh thaan |
lines.english: The fear of the three worlds is dispelled, and I have found my place of rest and peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਤੂ ਟੇਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰਾ ਆਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: naanak kee too ttek prabh teraa aadhaar |
lines.english: O God, You are the Anchor and Support of Nanak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਕਰੀ ਸਮਰਥ ਗੁਰਿ ਬਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਨਾਮ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: deaa karee samarath gur basiaa man naam |3|
lines.english: The all-powerful Guru has taken pity upon me, and the Naam has come to dwell in my mind. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹਰਿ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰ ॥੪॥੧੯॥੪੯॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran samarath prabh har agam apaar |4|19|49|
lines.english: He is the Doer, the Cause of causes; the All-powerful Lord God is inaccessible and infinite. ||4||19||49||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਮਲੀਨੁ ਦੀਨੁ ਹੀਨੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਬਿਸਰਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: soee maleen deen heen jis prabh bisaraanaa |
lines.english: One who forgets God is filthy, poor and low.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਤਦੇ ਜਦਿ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਚਿਤਿ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: dookh tade jad veesarai sukh prabh chit aae |
lines.english: Pain comes, when one forgets Him. Peace comes when one remembers God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨੈਹਾਰੁ ਨ ਬੂਝਈ ਆਪੁ ਗਨੈ ਬਿਗਾਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: karanaihaar na boojhee aap ganai bigaanaa |1|
lines.english: The fool does not understand the Creator Lord; instead, he thinks that he himself is the doer. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚੇ ਤੇ ਨੀਚਾ ਕਰੈ ਨੀਚ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਥਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: aooche te neechaa karai neech khin meh thaapai |
lines.english: The high, He makes low, and the low, he elevates in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਨ ਕੈ ਆਨੰਦੁ ਏਹੁ ਨਿਤ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: santan kai aanand ehu nit har gun gaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This is the way the Saints are in bliss - they continually sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਈਐ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਪਰਤਾਪੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: keemat kahee na jaaeeai tthaakur parataapai |2|
lines.english: The value of the glory of our Lord and Master cannot be estimated. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਖਤ ਲੀਲਾ ਰੰਗ ਰੂਪ ਚਲਨੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: pekhat leelaa rang roop chalanai din aaeaa |
lines.english: While he gazes upon beautiful dramas and plays, the day of his departure dawns.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਪਨੇ ਕਾ ਸੁਪਨਾ ਭਇਆ ਸੰਗਿ ਚਲਿਆ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: supane kaa supanaa bheaa sang chaliaa kamaaeaa |3|
lines.english: The dream becomes the dream, and his actions do not go along with him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran samarath prabh teree saranaaee |
lines.english: God is All-powerful, the Cause of causes; I seek Your Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲੁ ਢੋਵਉ ਇਹ ਸੀਸ ਕਰਿ ਕਰ ਪਗ ਪਖਲਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: jal dtovau ih sees kar kar pag pakhalaavau |
lines.english: I carry water on my head, and with my hands I wash their feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਪੈ ਸਦ ਸਦ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੪॥੨੦॥੫੦॥
lines.translit: har dinas rain naanak japai sad sad bal jaaee |4|20|50|
lines.english: Day and night, Nanak meditates on the Lord; forever and ever he is a sacrifice. ||4||20||50||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਉ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਮਨੈ ਮਾਹਿ ਅਪਨੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇ ਪਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: krau manorath manai maeh apane prabh te paavau |
lines.english: The hopes which I cherish in my mind - my God fulfills them all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਰਿ ਜਾਉ ਲਖ ਬੇਰੀਆ ਦਰਸੁ ਪੇਖਿ ਜੀਵਾਵਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: baar jaau lakh bereea daras pekh jeevaavau |1|
lines.english: Tens of thousands of times, I am a sacrifice to them; gazing upon the Blessed Vision of their Darshan, I live. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਗੁਣ ਸੰਤ ਬੋਲਤੇ ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨਹਿ ਪੀਲਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: amrit gun sant bolate sun maneh peelaavau |
lines.english: The Saints chant the Ambrosial Praises of the Lord; I listen, and my mind drinks it in.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਉ ਸੂਹਨੀ ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਬੀਜਨੁ ਢੋਲਾਵਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: deo soohanee saadh kai beejan dtolaavau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: With my broom, I sweep the homes of the Holy Saints, and wave the fan over them. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਆ ਰਸ ਮਹਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਬਿਖੈ ਜਲਨਿ ਬੁਝਾਵਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: auaa ras meh saant tripat hoe bikhai jalan bujhaavau |2|
lines.english: That sublime essence calms and soothes me, and quenches the fire of sin and corruption. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਸੰਤ ਮੰਡਲੀ ਤਿਨੑ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: jab bhagat kareh sant manddalee tina mil har gaavau |
lines.english: When the galaxy of Saints worship the Lord in devotion, I join them, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਉ ਨਮਸਕਾਰ ਭਗਤ ਜਨ ਧੂਰਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਲਾਵਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: krau namasakaar bhagat jan dhoor mukh laavau |3|
lines.english: I bow in reverence to the humble devotees, and apply the dust of their feet to my face. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਠਤ ਬੈਠਤ ਜਪਉ ਨਾਮੁ ਇਹੁ ਕਰਮੁ ਕਮਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: aootthat baitthat jpau naam ihu karam kamaavau |
lines.english: Sitting down and standing up, I chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord; this is what I do.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਨਿ ਸਮਾਵਉ ॥੪॥੨੧॥੫੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kee prabh benatee har saran samaavau |4|21|51|
lines.english: This is Nanak's prayer to God, that he may merge in the Lord's Sanctuary. ||4||21||51||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਵਸੈ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਪਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat kai sang vasai vaddabhaagee paae |1|
lines.english: He dwells with the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; by great good fortune, he finds the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਸੋਈ ਤਰੈ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eihu saagar soee tarai jo har gun gaae |
lines.english: He alone crosses over this world-ocean, who sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord.
